stemHtml: Which condition is least favourable handling-wise during take-off for a twin engine aircraft with the engines wing mounted, both being right hand props?

options.a: A right engine failure, with a right quartering wind.
options.b: A left engine failure, with a right quartering wind
options.c: A left engine failure, with a left quartering wind.
options.d: A right engine failure, with a left quartering wind.
